description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.4 Docker image with a global before_script that echoes Hello World and two variables: DOMAIN set to example.com and WEBHOOK_URL set to https://my-webhook.example.com. Define four jobs that all run in the default test stage: a capybara job that disables variable inheritance and runs "bundle exec capybara"; a karma job that inherits the default configuration and the DOMAIN variable and runs "karma"; an rspec job that inherits the default image and the WEBHOOK_URL variable and runs "bundle exec rspec"; and a rubocop job that disables both default and variable inheritance and runs "bundle exec rubocop". No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are required.
